definition: The ordered set of routes a router matches against the URL — authored as the <template route> children of a <we-route-view> (the declarative-DOM source-of-truth, #1685). First match wins; webrouting derives a serializable route-map projection from it.
usage: The canonical authoring form of an app's routes. Each entry carries a URLPattern path + optional guard/loader/outlet/error-boundary.
